text_raw: Must have been some kind of beast...
text_clean: Must have been some kind of beast...

text_raw: Imagine having to fear death by bear, of all things...
text_clean: Imagine having to fear death by bear, of all things...

text_raw: Wh—truly? You took down that mountain of a beast?
text_clean: Wh—truly? You took down that mountain of a beast?

text_raw: I thought I'd be shutting the hives for good and digging myself an early grave...
text_clean: I thought I'd be shutting the hives for good and digging myself an early grave...

text_raw: But you saved me. And the apiary too.
text_clean: But you saved me. And the apiary too.

text_raw: From now on, whenever you come here, wear this. It'll serve you well.
text_clean: From now on, whenever you come here, wear this. It'll serve you well.
